ab: Muskun azak qudasnau’az takna munhaan babalivan mapabaliv sanglav, madas a qudasnau’az madia kain’anakan masuaz tu sanglav, matas’i amin madia manambuq tu kakaunun ispaka’un taisis’aan.
ch: 昨天我跟奶奶去市集擺攤，奶奶帶了許多自己種的蔬菜去，也製作了原住民美食給大家。
en: Yesterday, I went to the market with my grandmother to set up a stall. My grandmother brought a lot of vegetables that she grew herself and also prepared indigenous cuisine for everyone.

ab: Mazima amin taisis’aan isia qudasnau’az tu babalivan, madia bunun mabaliv dauqpuut siin pa’isaz tikis, madia bunun tanam ma’un isiata sinpit’ia mahansum tu pan’ai’an.
ch: 大家很喜歡奶奶的攤位，辣椒和車輪茄很多人買，許多人來品嘗她煮的菜餚。
en: Everyone loved my grandmother’s stall. Many people bought the chilis and African eggplants, and many people came to taste the dishes she cooked.

ab: Isiata sinhanat tu li’li’ siin sinpit’ia tu maduq qaising qai mastaan tu manambuq kaunun, haizang makusia qaimus sinhanat maivanis tu titi, madia taisis’aan tis’uni kaihansuman minsuma, ihaan amin inaam babalivan tu tanangaus maldailaz.
ch: 她煮的蕨菜和糯米飯非常好吃，還有用山豬肉煮的馬告滷肉，味道吸引了很多客人，大家都來我們攤位排隊。
en: The ferns and sticky rice she cooked were delicious, as well as the braised pork with maqaw pepper and wild boar meat. The flavors attracted many customers, and everyone lined up at our stall.

ab: Maaq tu mahanat a qudasnau’az qai, ihaan azak dingalan malhanu ki minisuma tu taisis’aan, ihaan azak dingalan tusqit luluklas tupa tu, “Kain’anakan zami ka sanglavun sinsuaz, masihal a sintal’ia, kavavaa’a mun’iti mabaliv!”
ch: 奶奶煮東西的時候，我在旁邊招攬客人。我在一旁大喊著：「蔬菜都是自己種的，天然有機，趕快來買喔!」
en: While my grandmother was cooking, I was on the side attracting customers. I shouted, \"The vegetables are self-grown, all-natural and organic! Come and buy now!\"

ab: Mahaipi inaam isbaliv tu sanglav pit’aminun mabaliv, tupa qudasnau’az tu, “Tis’uni amin haiza isuu tu sin’indangaz.”
ch: 我們的東西很快就賣完了，奶奶說：「都是因為有你的幫忙。」
en: Our goods sold out quickly, and my grandmother said, \"It’s all thanks to your help.\"

ab: Maaq a sinkuzakuzakun qai, mapinqansiapin zaku pali’uni Takisilazan miniqumis tu sinsusuaz siin kakaunun tu kaiqansiapan, musasuu tu matlazin maqansiap malkasia babalivan sinkuzakuza tu iniqdi’an.
ch: 這個活動，我學到了有關原住民植物和食品的知識，並且體驗到了擺攤的辛苦。
en: Through this event, I learned about indigenous plants and food and experienced the hard work of running a stall.

ab: Sadu’an zaku qudasnau’az haiza’an malkasia itu qabas Takisilazan miniqumis kakaunun tu kaibaqisan is’aang, mastaan azak matunahip matumasqing.
ch: 看到了奶奶對傳統食物的熱愛，我感到非常高興和榮幸。
en: Seeing my grandmother’s passion for traditional food, I feel very proud and honored.
